title: 8 招玩转 NotebookLM 幻灯片组
author: Tomas Vorel
content:
A few weeks ago, we introduced Nano Banana Pro, our latest Gemini image model, to NotebookLM with Infographics and Slide Decks. Since then, we’ve added both features to the mobile app and expanded access to more people.

NotebookLM collapses the content creation process — from research to design — into a single workflow. It helps produce professional, data-driven content that was previously limited to design teams.

When you create Slide Decks in NotebookLM, you’re drawing on the visual capabilities of Nano Banana Pro, but you’re also using NotebookLM’s own creative agents, the same underlying approach that makes Audio and Video Overviews so engaging. The combination is what gives you this powerful engine for visual storytelling.

Here are a few of our favorite ways people can tell stories through Nano Banana Pro.

1. Convert Deep Research into slides.

Dense research reports often overwhelm visual learners. NotebookLM solves this by converting Deep Research into custom slide decks, uncovering metaphors and connections you might otherwise miss. Simply ask a question, run Deep Research and request a deck in any format.

2. Generate slides from rough notes.

Last-minute presentations create unnecessary stress. Avoid hours of design work: either create a note in NotebookLM and add it as a source, or attach a rough draft from Google Slides. Jot down key points, an outline or a stream-of-consciousness brainstorm. You can even upload handwritten notes. Use this source to instruct NotebookLM to build a full slide deck instantly.

3. Brainstorm new ideas.

You can also use slides to explore new ideas or concepts based on your project’s sources. For example, using our Featured Notebook on Jane Austen, we generated a pitch deck for holiday-themed fan-fiction sequels, complete with jacket covers and plot descriptions.

4. Refine your slides with brand styling.

To polish an existing presentation, upload your slides to NotebookLM. Ask the tool to enhance aesthetics, apply brand colors or incorporate visuals from your sources. NotebookLM applies your style guidelines, ensuring the final product meets your standards.

5. Understand any topics faster with illustrations.

Using Gemini’s world knowledge, NotebookLM visualizes data through powerful metaphors and visualizations. If you have documents full of numbers but are struggling to communicate your point across, NotebookLM can help. By applying familiar formats to complex concepts, you make difficult content accessible without losing detail.

6. Convert dense and lengthy content into a beautiful storybook.

NotebookLM handles large documents with ease. Convert your long documents, set of articles or even your entire book into a beautifully visual narrative.

7. Turn photos into a recipe book.

Simply snap a few pictures of your holiday baking and have NotebookLM convert it into a delightful recipe book. You can just use Gemini’s world understanding to describe the recipes, or upload your notes and NotebookLM will take care of the rest.

8. Sketch out your plan in the style you prefer.

Slides in your favorite editing software can be styled in any way and there’s no reason this should be limiting you in NotebookLM. You can define any visual or creative style you want and get to the design you’re after. As long as it helps you get to your goal

Get started today

Slide Decks are available to all NotebookLM users over 18 years old. For now, users have two options for length and format. Since last week, users with the AI Ultra subscription can also generate longer decks with two times higher limits. With these updates, NotebookLM is turning from a research assistant into your partner for communicating knowledge. We can’t wait to see how you put it to use.
aiSummary: 本文介绍了 8 种方法，利用 NotebookLM 由 Nano Banana Pro 提供支持的幻灯片组功能，满足从研究转换到个性化内容创作等各种需求。
oneSentenceSummary: 本文介绍了 8 种方法，利用 NotebookLM 由 Nano Banana Pro 提供支持的幻灯片组功能，满足从研究转换到个性化内容创作等各种需求。
summary: 本文重点介绍了利用 NotebookLM 幻灯片组功能的八种有效策略，该功能集成了 Nano Banana Pro Gemini 图像模型和 NotebookLM 的智能体。这些策略将 NotebookLM 从一个研究助手转变为一个强大的视觉叙事和内容创作工具。主要功能包括将深度研究转化为定制幻灯片组、从粗略笔记生成演示文稿、通过视觉辅助集思广益新想法、根据品牌风格优化现有幻灯片、通过可视化简化复杂主题以提升理解速度、将冗长内容转化为视觉故事、从照片创建食谱书，以及以偏好风格草拟计划。NotebookLM 强调研究和设计的无缝集成，旨在普及专业内容创作，使其对更广泛的受众（包括移动用户和拥有 AI Ultra 订阅以扩展功能的用户）开放。

mainPoints.point: NotebookLM 的幻灯片组功能（由 Nano Banana Pro 提供支持）简化了内容创作。
mainPoints.explanation: 它将研究和设计工作流程整合到单一流程中，使用户能够生成以前需要设计团队才能完成的专业、数据驱动的视觉内容。

mainPoints.point: 该平台有助于将多样化输入（研究、笔记、照片）转换为结构化的视觉输出。
mainPoints.explanation: 用户可以将密集的报告、粗略的笔记甚至照片转换为精美的幻灯片组、故事书或食谱书，从而提高可访问性和参与度。

mainPoints.point: NotebookLM 支持多种应用，从学术研究到创意头脑风暴和品牌一致性。
mainPoints.explanation: 它满足各种用户需求，包括使学术内容易于理解、促进创造性思维、确保演示文稿符合品牌调性，以及创建个性化视觉内容。

keyQuotes: NotebookLM 将内容创作过程——从研究到设计——整合到一个单一的工作流程中。
这种组合提供了一个强大的视觉叙事引擎。
通过这些更新，NotebookLM 正在从一个研究助手转变为您交流知识的伙伴。
